title: Smithers Oasis Pack of 2 Floral Foam Heart Frames 9\
features: Sold in a pack of 2 hearts
Made from 5cm depth of oasis brand floral foam
Foam is bonded to a strong waterproof backing sheet
Strong and easy to handle, clean and comfortable to use
Generally used as a funeral tribute
description: Use when designing tributes in the shape of a heart. Competitively priced and easy to use. Generally used as a funeral tribute. Can also be used for silk flowers. Foam frames design frames are a range of cut shapes made from wetable floral foam bonded to a strong waterproof backing foam. Available in many different shapes and sizes, they are the perfect platform for florists who want to show off their creative talents.
